TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u kawaw a laylay nu Taywan subal amin saliwliw mibetik a kawaw 2018.07.07-08 siwkay 20180630-dabek nu minanam tu kamu nu Sakizaya, u sapinanam a sulit, mudadiw minanam tu Sakizaya a kamu. tina sapicudad a kawaw sa, tayza i Taynan atu Pingtung mibetik. lacul demiad:2018.07.07-07.08(sakaenem a demiad nu lipayan atu milipayan) mukelihay a tademaw:Lou Cengsin atu acawana niza,ci Tumi atu acawana niza ci Keliw,Tumuk ci Kumud,ci Kala,ci Panay,ci Tuku ,ci Lisin,ci Kayang,ci Kuli,ci Balah,ci Mayaw Kilang atu laluma'an niza pulung sepat a tademaw,ci Tipua atu cabay niza ci Mongting,pulung sa 18 a tademaw. tina culil nu sapibetik a kawaw sa, u inayi' ku kalisiw paaca. pakuniza mikelih. pizikucen tu sapibetikay a zikuc nu mibetikay, u zuma a tademaw sa, kasizikuc nu Sakizaya. u kakalimaan a sulit:inayi' paacad tu kalisiw,kakuniza mikelih,kakuniza malingad tayza. paaca tu ku kakabian, kya pida sa, pabeli aca. muculil a laylay: 2018.07.06(sakalima a demiad nu lipayan) kakuniza malingad. 2018.07.07(sakaenem a demaid nu lipayan) 10:00-12:00, Taynan, ayaw nu likisi a kuwan, mibetik atu mizizaw. 2018.07.07(sakaenem a demaid nu lipayan) 15:00-17:00, Taynan, Silaya cidekay, Alicu dabek, mibetik atu mizizaw 2018.07.08(milipayan) i Pingtung lalangawan a subal 09:00-10:10 mihalhal atu mibetik 10:30-11:30 miazih tu palaw nu yincumincu lalangawan aidangan ********************* 2018 a mihcaan sapibetik a culil nu Lubas putiput: 1. 0113 Kalingku pangangan nu Sakizaya a kinin demiad mibetik ==>mahmintu 2. 0306 Kalingku nipuhpuhan tu ninel atu mapatayay ==>mahmintu 3. 0504 Kalingku Nalalacanan mibetik tu Kabid ==>mahmintu 4. 0505 Sincu 12liyaw alipawnay a edil mibetik ==>mahmintu 5. 0519 Amilika Boston-Cian masasiket mibetik ==>mahmintu 6. 0616 Kalingku, Sakizaya atu Kabalan miketun tu mabalud a kining demiad ==>mahmintu 7. 0707 Taynan ayaw nu likisi a kwuan Nake ciid a kwuan 8. 0707 Taynan Silaya cidekay Alicu dabek 9. 0708 Pingtung Yincumincu lalangawan aidangan Sakizaya a luma' 10. 8 a bulad Kalingku malalikit misalisin atu mibetik 11. 0915 Kalingku ngangayaw 140 a mihcaan kining binawlan saungay mibuhat 12. 0922 Kalingku ngangayaw 140 a mihcaan kining binawlan saungay sapigankiway 13. 0929 Kalingku atu Pusung Sakizaya atu Kabalan niyazu' patakus 14. 1006 Kalingku palamal 15. 1013 Yilan Kabalan mibetik tu tuas atu palabang 16. 1020 Taoyuan palamal 17. 11 a bulad Sinpeise Kaytakelan mibetik tu tuas atu palabang 18. 11 a bulad Taypei 228 aidangan mibetik (ŚŹįŚĆó 228ŚÖ¨Śúí) 19. 12 a bulad Taitung Puyuma malumanay a kakitizaan mibetik 20. 12 a bulad Taitung i luma' ni Tipus mibetik namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan nasulitan nay pabalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1 sakasitangah nu Sakizaya
S.PHON: u kawaw a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu tajwan subar~…ĺ amin sar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mib…ôtik a kawaw ****.**.**-** siwkaj ********-dab…ôk nu minanam tu kamu nu sakizaja, u sapinanam a sur~…ĺit, mudadiw minanam tu sakizaja a kamu. tina sapi ¶udad a kawaw sa, tajza i tajnan atu piŇčtuŇč mib…ôtik. r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ d…ômiad:****.**.**-**.**(saka…ôn…ôm a d…ômiad nu r~…ĺipajan atu mir~…ĺipajan) muk…ôr~…ĺińßaj a tad…ômaw:r~…ĺou ¶…ôŇčsin atu a ¶awana niza, ¶i tumi atu a ¶awana niza ¶i k…ôr~…ĺiw,tumuk ¶i kumud, ¶i kar~…ĺa, ¶i panaj, ¶i tuku , ¶i r~…ĺisin, ¶i kajaŇč, ¶i kur~…ĺi, ¶i bar~…ĺańß, ¶i majaw kir~…ĺaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an niza pur~…ĺuŇč s…ôpat a tad…ômaw, ¶i tipua atu ¶abaj niza ¶i moŇčtiŇč,pur~…ĺuŇč sa ** a tad…ômaw. tina ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sapib…ôtik a kawaw sa, u inaji Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺisiw paa ¶a. pakuniza mik…ôr~…ĺińß. piziku ¶…ôn tu sapib…ôtikaj a ziku ¶ nu mib…ôtikaj, u zuma a tad…ômaw sa, kasiziku ¶ nu sakizaja. u kakar~…ĺimaan a sur~…ĺit:inaji Ē~ ° paa ¶ad tu kar~…ĺisiw,kakuniza mik…ôr~…ĺińß,kakuniza mar~…ĺiŇčad tajza. paa ¶a tu ku kakabian, kja pida sa, pab…ôr~…ĺi a ¶a. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj: ****.**.**(sakar~…ĺima a d…ômiad nu r~…ĺipajan) kakuniza mar~…ĺiŇčad. ****.**.**(saka…ôn…ôm a d…ômaid nu r~…ĺipajan) **:**-**:**, tajnan, ajaw nu r~…ĺikisi a kuwan, mib…ôtik atu mizizaw. ****.**.**(saka…ôn…ôm a d…ômaid nu r~…ĺipajan) **:**-**:**, tajnan, sir~…ĺaja ¶id…ôkaj, ar~…ĺi ¶u dab…ôk, mib…ôtik atu mizizaw ****.**.**(mir~…ĺipajan) i piŇčtuŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a subar~…ĺ **:**-**:** mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ atu mib…ôtik **:**-**:** miazińß tu par~…ĺaw nu jin ¶umin ¶u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan aidaŇčan ********************* **** a mińß ¶aan sapib…ôtik a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu r~…ĺubas putiput: *. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku paŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja a kinin d…ômiad mib…ôtik ==>mańßmintu *. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku nipuńßpuńßan tu nin…ôr~…ĺ atu mapatajaj ==>mańßmintu *. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku nar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶anan mib…ôtik tu kabid ==>mańßmintu *. **** sin ¶u **r~…ĺijaw ar~…ĺipawnaj a …ôdir~…ĺ mib…ôtik ==>mańßmintu *. **** amir~…ĺika boston- ¶ian masasik…ôt mib…ôtik ==>mańßmintu *. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku, sakizaja atu kabar~…ĺan mik…ôtun tu mabar~…ĺud a kiniŇč d…ômiad ==>mańßmintu *. **** tajnan ajaw nu r~…ĺikisi a kwuan nak…ô ¶iid a kwuan *. **** tajnan sir~…ĺaja ¶id…ôkaj ar~…ĺi ¶u dab…ôk *. **** piŇčtuŇč jin ¶umin ¶u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan aidaŇčan sakizaja a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° **. * a bur~…ĺad kar~…ĺiŇčku mar~…ĺar~…ĺikit misar~…ĺisin atu mib…ôtik **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku ŇčaŇčajaw *** a mińß ¶aan kiniŇč binawr~…ĺan sauŇčaj mibuńßat **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku ŇčaŇčajaw *** a mińß ¶aan kiniŇč binawr~…ĺan sauŇčaj sapigankiwaj **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku atu pusuŇč sakizaja atu kabar~…ĺan nijazu Ē~ ° patakus **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku par~…ĺamar~…ĺ **. **** jir~…ĺan kabar~…ĺan mib…ôtik tu tuas atu par~…ĺabaŇč **. **** taojuan par~…ĺamar~…ĺ **. ** a bur~…ĺad sinp…ôis…ô kajtak…ôr~…ĺan mib…ôtik tu tuas atu par~…ĺabaŇč **. ** a bur~…ĺad tajp…ôi *** aidaŇčan mib…ôtik (** *****) **. ** a bur~…ĺad taituŇč pujuma mar~…ĺumanaj a kakitizaan mib…ôtik **. ** a bur~…ĺad taituŇč i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni tipus mib…ôtik namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan nasur~…ĺitan naj pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu subana Ē~ °aj a pu ****-* sakasitaŇčańß nu sakizaja
S.FORM: u kawaw a laylay nu Taywan subal amin saliwliw mibetik a kawaw 2018.07.07-08 siwkay 20180630-dabek nu minanam tu kamu nu Sakizaya, u sapinanam a sulit, mudadiw minanam tu Sakizaya a kamu. tina sapicudad a kawaw sa, tayza i Taynan atu Pingtung mibetik. lacul demiad:2018.07.07-07.08(sakaenem a demiad nu lipayan atu milipayan) mukelihay a tademaw:Lou Cengsin atu acawana niza,ci Tumi atu binawlan saungay sapigankiway 13. 0929 Kalingku atu Pusung Sakizaya atu Kabalan niyazu' patakus 14. 1006 Kalingku palamal 15. 1013 Yilan Kabalan mibetik tu tuas atu palabang 16. 1020 Taoyuan palamal ==>mańßmintu *. **** amir~…ĺika boston- ¶ian masasik…ôt mib…ôtik ==>mańßmintu *. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku, sakizaja atu kabar~…ĺan mik…ôtun tu mabar~…ĺud a kiniŇč d…ômiad ==>mańßmintu *. **** tajnan ajaw nu r~…ĺikisi a kwuan nak…ô ¶iid a kwuan *. **** tajnan sir~…ĺaja ¶id…ôkaj ar~…ĺi ¶u dab…ôk *. **** piŇčtuŇč jin ¶umin ¶u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan aidaŇčan sakizaja a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° **. * a bur~…ĺad kar~…ĺiŇčku mar~…ĺar~…ĺikit misar~…ĺisin atu mib…ôtik **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku ŇčaŇčajaw *** a mińß ¶aan kiniŇč binawr~…ĺan sauŇčaj mibuńßat **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku ŇčaŇčajaw *** a mińß ¶aan kiniŇč binawr~…ĺan sauŇčaj sapigankiwaj **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku atu pusuŇč sakizaja atu kabar~…ĺan nijazu Ē~ ° patakus **. **** kar~…ĺiŇčku par~…ĺamar~…ĺ **. **** jir~…ĺan kabar~…ĺan mib…ôtik tu tuas atu par~…ĺabaŇč **. **** taojuan par~…ĺamar~…ĺ **. ** a bur~…ĺad sinp…ôis…ô kajtak…ôr~…ĺan mib…ôtik tu tuas atu par~…ĺabaŇč **. ** a bur~…ĺad tajp…ôi *** aidaŇčan mib…ôtik (** *****) **. ** a bur~…ĺad taituŇč pujuma subana Ē~ °aj a pu ****-* sakasitaŇčańß nu sakizaja
